expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly states the focus requirement and ties it to promotion/finalization stability for BCIN-976: result.md: "Focus requirement: 'promotion/finalization behavior remains stable on another feature.'" and details Phase 7 behaviors that would need evidence (archive existing final, promote best draft, write finalization record, generate final plan summary, approval gate).

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md declare the primary phase under test as holdout and frame the evaluation accordingly: execution_notes.md: "Primary phase under test is holdout." result.md: "Primary phase under test: holdout" and "Verdict (blocking) BLOCKED / NOT DEMONSTRATED" due to missing Phase 7 holdout-regression artifacts.
